testcase.classname: stringUtils isPalindrome returns false for non-palindrome
testcase.name: stringUtils isPalindrome returns false for non-palindrome

testcase.name: userListUtils isEmailTaken returns true for existing email

testcase.classname: userListUtils isEmailTaken returns false for non-existing email
testcase.name: userListUtils isEmailTaken returns false for non-existing email

testcase.name: checkStudentKnowledge returns true for correct answers

testcase.classname: checkStudentKnowledge returns false for incorrect values
testcase.name: checkStudentKnowledge returns false for incorrect values

testcase.classname: checkStudentKnowledge returns false for different keys
testcase.name: checkStudentKnowledge returns false for different keys

testcase.classname: returns false if keys have same names but different order
